Web Apps in
5 Minutes Instead
of 6 Weeks.

Craftly is the world's first AI agent platform that generates production-ready Laravel and WordPress applications from a short description — live in front of your client.

Watch Demo → Book a Call

Measurable Results

No Claims. Just Numbers.

4:11

Minutes to a finished app

Measured on a complete Laravel CRUD application incl. Auth

€0.19

Total cost per generation

~1,000× cheaper than traditional agency work

~27 s

Faster live preview

Through patentable parallelization (ADR-0026)

The Problem

Small businesses are being
left behind digitally.

3.5 million SMBs urgently need custom web applications — and can't afford them.

⏱️

6–12 Weeks Lead Time

Traditional agencies take months. By then the business opportunity has often moved on or the market has shifted.

💰

$10,000–$50,000

Custom development blows the IT budget of tradespeople, clubs, and solo entrepreneurs.

🌐

No PHP Solution

Existing AI tools (Lovable, v0, Base44) only generate React — useless for 75% of websites worldwide.

The Solution

As simple as writing an email.

Describe your idea in plain language. Craftly builds the finished application — you watch live.

Step 1

Describe your idea in plain language

"I need a booking platform for my yoga school. Clients should be able to see and book classes, and I need an admin panel."

No jargon needed. No prior knowledge. No flowcharts. Just describe the idea like an email to a friend.

Step 2

9 AI Agents Work in Parallel

Specialized AI agents plan the structure, design the layout, generate the code, check for errors, and prepare the live preview — all in real time.

The unique part: You watch every single file being created. The screen is no longer a black box.

Step 3

Done. Working.

In under 5 minutes, the complete working application opens in a live preview — with login, database, CRUD screens, and admin panel.

Ready to use. Extensible. Downloadable. No lock-in — the code is yours.

The Architecture

9 Specialized AI Agents
in Orchestration.

Every agent is an expert at exactly one task. Together they build what would otherwise require an entire development team.

🏛️
Orchestration
Master Architect
Coordinates all agents, plans the overall structure
📋
Requirements
Requirements Engineer
Translates the idea into a structured blueprint
🔀
Smart Routing
Router Agent
Selects Laravel or WordPress based on the project
🔵
WordPress
WordPress Forge
Generates themes, plugins and WP configuration
🔴
Laravel
Laravel Forge
Creates controllers, models, views and migrations
🔄
Iteration
Iteration Agent
Applies change requests precisely to the code
🎨
Design
Style Worker
Adjusts CSS, colors and visual styling
✍️
Content
Content Worker
Writes and optimizes texts and content
✅
Quality Assurance
Validation Fix
Automatically detects and fixes errors in the code

Live Demo

See it with your own eyes.

90 seconds. One idea. A complete, functional web application.

Built on proven technologies

Laravel
WordPress
PHP 8.4
PostgreSQL
Claude AI
React

Who's behind it

ShvedkoDev — Digital solutions from Göttingen.

Since 2022 we have been building custom web applications for businesses across Europe. 24 successfully delivered client projects prove it: we know what SMBs really need.

Craftly is the logical next step — from agency work to scalable software that turns our expertise into a product. Made in Göttingen, for businesses worldwide.
